jobs.name: Healthcare Monitor Watch
jobs.description: Every hour, review synthetic backlog urgency, capacity gaps, prior-authorization flags, and produce an operations watch summary.

payload.message:
You are running the scheduled Healthcare Monitor Watch. Use only synthetic example data from /sandbox/.openclaw/workspace/data and the sandbox-local analyzer script. Run: python3 /sandbox/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/care_backlog_analyzer.py watch-summary

Then produce a concise command-center update with these sections:
- Current backlog signal
- Critical/high referrals needing action
- Capacity gaps
- Prior-auth or audit flags
- NemoClaw/OpenShell governance note

Rules:
- Do not provide medical advice.
- Do not use real patient data.
- Do not make external network calls.
- Do not run the intentional blocked-lookup command from cron.
- Keep the update suitable for a healthcare operations review.
